argument_units.text: Both the vulnerable children and the children of frontline can go to school as we did in the first lockdown

so that by the middle of February, those first four categories, the most vulnerable four categories
if you get through the nine categories, we have essentially dealt with ninety nine percent of deaths

being more data driven around where the technology is being used for the benefit of people
